mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username AS user_name, r.equipment_id, e.equipment_no, e.equipment_name, r.description, r.image_urls, r.status, r.handle_remark, r.create_time, r.handle_time FROM fitness_equipment_repair r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN fitness_equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id WHERE r.deleted = false AND r.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.description, r.equipment_id, e.equipment_no, e.equipment_name, r.image_urls, r.status, r.handle_remark, r.create_time, r.handle_time FROM fitness_equipment_repair r LEFT JOIN fitness_equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = false ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username AS user_name, r.equipment_id, e.equipment_no, e.equipment_name, r.description, r.image_urls, r.status, r.handle_remark, r.create_time, r.handle_time FROM fitness_equipment_repair r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN fitness_equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id WHERE r.deleted = false ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username AS user_name, r.equipment_id, e.equipment_no, e.equipment_name, r.description, r.image_urls, r.status, r.handle_remark, r.create_time, r.handle_time FROM fitness_equipment_repair r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN fitness_equipment e ON r.equipment_id = e.id WHERE r.id = #{repairId} AND r.deleted = false
